# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: web-application
description: A Helm chart for our web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: web-application
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "latest"

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80
  targetPort: 8080

ingress:
  enabled: false
  className: ""
  annotations: {}
  hosts:
    - host: web-application.local
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: ImplementationSpecific
  tls: []

resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 500m
    memory: 256Mi
  requests:
    cpu: 250m
    memory: 128Mi

# Database configuration
# IMPORTANT: Override these values in production using --set or a separate values file.
# Do NOT use the defaults below in any production or publicly accessible environment.
database:
  host: database-service
  port: 5432
  name: webapp_db
  # These are INSECURE default credentials for local development/demo ONLY.
  # For production, supply credentials via a sealed secret or external secret manager.
  auth:
    existingSecret: ""
    username: "OVERRIDE_IN_PRODUCTION"
    password: "OVERRIDE_IN_PRODUCTION"

---
# templates/secret.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}-db-credentials
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: pre-install,pre-upgrade
    description: "Database credentials - MUST be overridden for production deployments"
type: Opaque
{{- if not .Values.database.auth.existingSecret }}
data:
  db-username: {{ .Values.database.auth.username | b64enc | quote }}
  db-password: {{ .Values.database.auth.password | b64enc | quote }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.database.host | quote }}
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: {{ .Values.database.port | quote }}
            - name: DB_NAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.name | quote }}
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Values.database.auth.existingSecret | default (printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "web-application.fullname" .)) }}
                  key: db-username
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Values.database.auth.existingSecret | default (printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "web-application.fullname" .)) }}
                  key: db-password
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}

---
# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    {{- include "web-application.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "web-application.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}
{{- define "web-application.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "web-application.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "web-application.name" . }}
{{ include "web-application.selectorLabels" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "web-application.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "web-application.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/tests/test-credentials-not-default.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: {{ include "web-application.fullname" . }}-credential-check
  labels:
    {{- include "web-application.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: test
    helm.sh/hook-delete-policy: hook-succeeded,hook-failed
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  containers:
    - name: credential-check
      image: busybox:1.36
      command: ['sh', '-c']
      args:
        - |
          echo "Checking that default credentials have been overridden..."
          if [ "$DB_USERNAME" = "OVERRIDE_IN_PRODUCTION" ] || [ "$DB_PASSWORD" = "OVERRIDE_IN_PRODUCTION" ]; then
            echo "WARNING: Default placeholder credentials detected. Override database.auth.username and database.auth.password for production use."
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Credentials have been overridden. Check passed."
          exit 0
      env:
        - name: DB_USERNAME
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: {{ .Values.database.auth.existingSecret | default (printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "web-application.fullname" .)) }}
              key: db-username
        - name: DB_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: {{ .Values.database.auth.existingSecret | default (printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "web-application.fullname" .)) }}
              key: db-password

---
# values-production.yaml
# Production overrides - use with: helm install -f values-production.yaml
# Or supply credentials via --set or an external secrets manager
database:
  auth:
    # Option 1: Reference a pre-existing Kubernetes secret (recommended)
    existingSecret: "production-db-credentials"
    # Option 2: Set directly (less secure, use sealed-secrets or external-secrets instead)
    # username: "<PROVIDE_SECURE_USERNAME>"
    # password: "<PROVIDE_SECURE_PASSWORD>"
